# Mission 34 - Customer & Vehicle UX Layer

## Mission Goal
Human-usable UX for customer, vehicle, relations, and service history in Soft Run Internal ERP.

## Phase
M31–M37 Product UX + Soft Run Interface Layer

## Dependencies
- Mission 31 — Design System
- Mission 32 — Application Shell
- Mission 15 — Customer/Vehicle foundation
- Mission 33 — JobCard UX (cross-links)

## Created Files
- public_html/erp-customer-vehicle-workbench.php
- public_html/erp-customer-detail-ux.php
- public_html/erp-vehicle-detail-ux.php
- public_html/erp-customer-vehicle-create-ux.php
- public_html/assets/moghare360-ui/moghare360-customer-vehicle-ux.css
- public_html/includes/moghare360-customer-vehicle-ux-data.php
- docs/missions/mission_34_customer_vehicle_ux_layer/ (11 Markdown files)

## Mission Boundary
UX layer only. SELECT read-only. No schema change. No write.

## Next Mission
Mission 35 (indicative) — not started until M34 signoff
